fn id(a: A): produce A / {} := produce a
---
id : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
fn keep(a: A): produce A / {} := produce a
---
keep : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
fn f(a: A): produce A / {} := let x = a in produce x
---
f : (A) -> produce A / {}
==========
fn bad(): produce A / {} := produce x
---
ERROR: unknown variable `x`
==========
fn bad(a: A): produce B / {} := produce a
---
ERROR: type mismatch: expected B, got A
==========
fn f(job: thunk produce A): produce A / {} := force job
---
f : (thunk produce A) -> produce A / {}
